_comment: JP-exclusive parallel variants (Championship promos, event prizes, etc.) that en.onepiece-cardgame.com does not list. Each entry is an alt-art parallel of an existing card; name/colors/cost/power/etc inherit from the base row at import time. Suffix convention: _jpN for the Nth JP-exclusive variant of a given base, chosen so it never collides with the site's own _pN / _rN parallels. See scripts/import-jp-exclusives.js for import logic and scripts/price_jp_exclusives.py for eBay-based price refresh.
_price_note: The `price` field in each entry is a conservative market estimate used as a floor so the UI never shows a null. Run `python -m scripts.price_jp_exclusives` with eBay creds to refresh with real consensus medians (stamps price_source='ebay_jp', overrides manual_jp). If eBay can't find consensus for a rare card, the manual_jp floor stays. Prices last reviewed 2026-04-23.
_image_note: Each `image_url` points at the OPTCG API proxy (https://optcg-api.arjunbansal-ai.workers.dev/images/{id}) which serves from R2 bucket optcg-images/cards/{id}.png. Images sourced from real eBay seller photos — the `note` field describes the specific variant/stamp shown in the uploaded scan, so the image stays in sync with how the card is labeled. If you swap an image, update the note to match.
